prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A multiplication-table-style grid. Row headers on the left show a union: "get", "set", "delete". Column headers on top show another union: "Name", "Age", "Email". Each cell in the grid contains the template literal combination: "getName", "getAge", "getEmail", "setName", "setAge", "setEmail", "deleteName", "deleteAge", "deleteEmail". Each cell is color-coded by row. An equation at the top shows the template: `${Action}${Field}` = 3 x 3 = 9 combinations. The grid visually demonstrates the combinatorial explosion. Arrows from row and column headers merge into each cell showing the concatenation.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
